title: psyllium squarrosum
intro: Psyllium squarrosum, also known as the psyllium plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a herb that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote bowel regularity. The medicinal properties of Psyllium squarrosum include its high content of mucilage, a soluble fiber that can help to calm inflammation and reduce symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Psyllium squarrosum can be prepared as an herbal tea or supplement, and its health benefits include improved digestion, lower cholesterol levels, and support for healthy blood sugar levels.
